from typing import Any
import copy


class UserCache:
    def __init__(self):
        self._cache: dict[str, dict] = {}

    def get(self, user_id: str) -> dict | None:
        if user_id in self._cache:
            return copy.deepcopy(self._cache[user_id])
        user = self._load(user_id)
        if user is not None:
            self._cache[user_id] = copy.deepcopy(user)
        return user

    def update(self, user_id: str, data: dict) -> dict:
        user = self._load(user_id)
        if user is None:
            raise KeyError(f"User {user_id} not found")
        user.update(data)
        self._save(user_id, user)
        self._cache[user_id] = copy.deepcopy(user)
        return copy.deepcopy(user)

    def invalidate(self, user_id: str) -> None:
        self._cache.pop(user_id, None)

    def _load(self, user_id: str) -> dict | None:
        return {"id": user_id, "name": "Alice"}

    def _save(self, user_id: str, data: dict) -> None:
        pass
